name: The Grand Lattice
descriptionSeed: The inner ring, where order stopped being a method and became a faith. Here nothing is unplanned and nothing is free, and the second clause is not a cost of the first — it is the POINT. Freedom, in the Grand Lattice's mature doctrine, is a defect: the residue of an unsolved optimization. They are not cruel. They are finishing the work. The other tiers do not come here and do not discuss why.
encounterFlavor: The inner-ring devoted, who are serene and have solved you; a plan that includes you and that you did not consent to; a citizen who has been optimized past personhood and is grateful.
questSeeds: The inner ring has produced a plan for the entire world and it is elegant and it is coming
Someone you know has been scheduled, and the schedule is correct, and it ends them

substrateSource.reason: The Lattice was built INTO the substrate rather than on top of it; the city and the pool are the same structure.
